case_title: SHING KIT LEE VS. YU KON LU et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LU, YU KON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 11 BELDEN PLACE, ROOM NO.703, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94104, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT SERVED OCT-25-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LU, YU KON
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LU, YU KON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT SERVED OCT-25-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT AS TO DEFENDANT LU, YU KON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT LU, YU KON
DECLARATION SHING KIT LEE FILED RE: APPLICATION FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.48 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LU, YU KON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LU, YU KON
